name: compass
description: Product Management productivity toolkit — repo-aware, multi-host, with integrations wizard

commands.name: init
commands.description: Set up Compass for the current project — language, stakeholders, repo-aware mode detection, and integrations wizard (Jira, Figma, Confluence, Vercel)

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show all Compass commands

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Configure or verify Compass integrations (Jira, Figma, Confluence, Vercel). Run with no args to see status, or /compass:setup <name> to configure one.

commands.name: ideate
commands.description: Brainstorm features from a pain point / opportunity / user feedback

commands.name: prd
commands.description: Write a complete PRD — NO code, follows the team's template. In Silver Tiger mode, auto-discovers dependencies from the capability registry.

commands.name: story
commands.description: Write User Stories + Acceptance Criteria (Given/When/Then). In Silver Tiger mode, stories are linked to epics and inherit their metadata.

commands.name: prioritize
commands.description: RICE / MoSCoW / Kano scoring for a backlog

commands.name: research
commands.description: Structured research — competitive analysis, market research, user feedback, tech evaluation

commands.name: prototype
commands.description: Create a professional UI prototype from a PRD or description. Uses UI/UX Pro Max skill.

commands.name: brief
commands.description: Gather requirements and identify Colleagues for a complex PO task

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Create DAG execution plan from brief session

commands.name: run
commands.description: Execute collab plan wave-by-wave with parallel Colleagues

commands.name: check
commands.description: Validate Colleague outputs and deliver to integrations

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update Compass to the latest version from GitHub. Checks current version, compares with latest tag, and pulls changes if available.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate state from v0.x to v1.0 (idempotent, safe to re-run)

commands.name: epic
commands.description: Create an epic from a PRD with folder structure and requirements mapping

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Quickly collect, structure, and theme user feedback into an actionable report

commands.name: roadmap
commands.description: Create a product roadmap from epics, priorities, and timeline constraints

commands.name: sprint
commands.description: Sprint planning — select stories by priority and capacity

commands.name: release
commands.description: Generate release notes from completed stories and epics

commands.name: undo
commands.description: Restore the previous version of the last modified document. Shows what will be restored, never deletes — renames instead. Confirms with PO before any action.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show project dashboard with document counts, progress, and blockers

commands.name: project
commands.description: Switch or list Compass projects (registry-backed).

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a period report (quarterly, half-year, annual, custom) from project artifacts and Jira data

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Housekeeping: close stale pipelines, archive old sessions, purge orphaned artifacts

commands.name: spec
commands.description: Turn a task description into DESIGN-SPEC + TEST-SPEC with adaptive format (code/ops/content). Dev track entry point.

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Decompose a reviewed spec into wave-based execution plan (DAG). Produces plan.json for /compass:cook.

commands.name: cook
commands.description: Execute a prepared plan wave-by-wave with parallel Agent dispatch (cook). Each task runs in fresh context.

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Smart commit — auto-generate conventional commit message from staged or changed files

commands.name: test
commands.description: Run tests — from TEST-SPEC acceptance criteria or auto-detected test suite

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Targeted hotfix — cross-layer root-cause tracing, minimal single-wave fix, commit.

integrations.name: jira
integrations.description: Search tickets, link epics, push stories
